description:
Product Features:

  • Small and convenient size
  • Made from wear-resistant and durable TPR material
  • Available in three colors: Light Sky Blue, Light Pink, Avocado Green
  • Weighs approximately 130 grams, with a tolerance of ±10 grams
  • Dimensions: 12.5 cm x 13 cm, with an inner ring diameter of 6.6 cm and a thickness of 2.8 cm

Specifications:

  1. Easy to clean - can be washed with clean water and is recyclable.
  2. Comes in three cute color options, which are preferred by pets.
  3. Designed to be wear-resistant and bite-resistant, suitable for dogs' teething needs.
  4. Convenient for storage with its round shape; can be wall-mounted to save space and is easy to grab.
  5. Features a spiral groove design that not only cleans pets' teeth while they play but also adds to its aesthetic appeal.

Package Included:

  • 1 Dog Teething Toy

This teething toy seems to be a practical choice for pet owners looking for a durable and easy-to-clean option to help their dogs with teething. The color options and design also make it an attractive addition to any home.
